# whoisalfaz.me

> Alfaz Mahmud Rizve — RevOps & Full Stack Automation Architect. Building autonomous business infrastructure for agencies and SaaS companies.

## About

whoisalfaz.me is the technical portfolio and blog of Alfaz Mahmud Rizve, a Revenue Operations (RevOps) architect specializing in autonomous business infrastructure. The site documents real-world automation architectures, case studies, and technical tutorials for agencies and SaaS companies.

## Core Expertise

- Revenue Operations (RevOps) Architecture
- n8n Workflow Automation & Self-Hosting
- Full Stack Web Development (Next.js, React, Supabase)
- CRM Pipeline Engineering (HubSpot, Brevo, Apollo)
- AI Agent Integration & LLM Orchestration
- Technical SEO & Programmatic Indexing

## Key Content

### Blog — 30 Days of n8n & Automation
A comprehensive 30-part technical series covering production-grade n8n automation workflows for B2B agencies: lead capture, scoring, enrichment, CRM sync, Slack notifications, Facebook Ads automation, automated reporting, content research, and more.

- [30 Days of n8n & Automation Series](https://whoisalfaz.me/blog/30-days-of-n8n/)

### Case Studies — Architecture Teardowns
Real-world technical case studies documenting complete system architectures built for clients, including a Zero-Hardware Kitchen OS (Next.js PWA), Financial Operations Dashboards, AI Resume Builders, and E-Commerce platforms.

- [Architecture Teardowns & Case Studies](https://whoisalfaz.me/case-studies/)

### Free Website Audit Tool
A high-performance, real-time diagnostic engine that audits any target URL. It performs PageSpeed core vitality checks, PageSpeed SEO scores, PageSpeed best practices, SSL certificate handshake validity, security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options), robots.txt & sitemap validation, and DNS connectivity checks.

- [Free Website Audit Tool](https://whoisalfaz.me/audit/)

### Interactive Tools & Labs
Free automation tools including an ROI calculator, website audit engine, and custom AI agents trained on n8n workflows and growth strategies.

- [Automation Playground](https://whoisalfaz.me/labs/)
- [ROI Calculator](https://whoisalfaz.me/labs/roi/)
- [Ask Alfaz AI](https://whoisalfaz.me/labs/chat/)

### Services
Professional automation and RevOps consulting services including n8n workflow development, headless CMS architecture, growth consulting, technical SEO audits, and custom full-stack web application engineering.

- [RevOps & Automation Services](https://whoisalfaz.me/services/)

### Technical Partnerships & B2B Placements
High-authority contextual link integrations and sponsored API tear-downs for B2B SaaS, DevTools, and RevOps platforms. Strict niche filter. 24h turnaround.

- [Sponsorships & B2B Content Placements](https://whoisalfaz.me/partners/)
